name: discrawl
description: Query a local Discord archive — search, freshness sync, DMs, channel slices, and read-only SQL counts — via the discrawl CLI before hitting live Discord APIs.

interface.shortDescription: Query a local Discord archive — search, freshness sync, DMs, channel slices, and read-only SQL counts — via the discrawl CLI before hitting live Discord APIs.
interface.longDescription: Check archive freshness with status/doctor, run bounded search and channel slices, and use read-only SQL for exact counts before ever mutating the DB.
